summary_en: ¥51.0M limit, 125,000 shares (1.2% of S/O), price ceiling ¥408/share, ToSTNeT-3 method, execution window 2026-05-18, to improve capital efficiency and execute flexible capital policy.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Kantsu HD has resolved to acquire treasury stock via Board decision on 2026-05-15 under Company Law article 156. The acquisition will be executed through off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3) on 2026-05-18 at the closing price of ¥408/share. The company will acquire up to 125,000 shares (1.2% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥51.0M. The purchase order is limited to the specified trading window on May 18. Results will be announced after trading closes. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and implement flexible capital policy in response to changing operating conditions. As of May 15, 2026, the company held 103,543 treasury shares against 10,308,150 outstanding shares.
